Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Continued To Nov-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Norma Jerry.

Mr. Vann stated that the Petition for Final Distribution was filed this morning with a hearing date of October 31, 2012. Status on close of Estate was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Continued To Sep-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Norma Jerry and Lois Hoyer.

Mr. Vann stated that he met with his Clients last week to sign the inventory and that he discovered that there is a 1986 Oldsmobile that needs to be sold. Status on close of the estate was continued to September 10, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with re-assurance from Mr. Vann that either a Petition to Close the Estate or a Petition for Approval of Status of Administration will be filed by that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
